HGSS.390.0000:
My MILTANK ain’t givin’ me milk
n’more.\f
This here farm’s got famous milk.\f
Most everyone wants a drink.
It’ll give me lots o’ milk if’n I feed it\r
lots o’ Berries, I reckon.
HGSS.390.0001:
How’d you like my Moomoo Milk?\f
It’s my pride and joy, there.\r
Give it to Pokémon to restore HP!\f
I’ll give it to ya fer just $500. [0200,0000]
HGSS.390.0002:
Here ya go!
Drink up’n enjoy!\f
HGSS.390.0003:
Sorry, there.
No cash, no sale!
HGSS.390.0005:
You don’t want it?
Come again, hear?
HGSS.390.0006: I best go do my milkin’.
HGSS.390.0007:
Our milk even goes out to Kanto.\f
So if our own MILTANK won’t give
us any milk, we’re in trouble.
HGSS.390.0008:
You fixed our MILTANK, hon.
Now it gives Moomoo Milk again.\f
Here’s somethin’ fer your trouble.
HGSS.390.0010:
That there’s Natural Gift.\f
Its move type and Power will depend
on the Berry yer Pokémon holds.\f
When you use it once, the Berry’s gone.
You best think how you ought to\r
use it, hon.
